title: melissa montana
intro: Melissa montana, also known as Lemon Bee Balm, is a perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Melissa montana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Melissa montana include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
